skills 不在多，在精。

多了之后，同一场景，可能多个 skills 都在嚷嚷自己可以，效果反而不好。

精有两个维度：

1/ 单一 skill 中的“结构”形状漂亮，在该问题空间中，找到了一个漂亮的解

2/ 多 skill 协同契合了自己独特的工作习惯，使起来丝滑流畅

R.I.P. every euro you thought you kept.

Your payment processor has been quietly double-dipping on currency conversion. Legally. Silently. Every transaction.

Customer pays euros → Stripe converts to dollars.

I pay contractor euros → Stripe converts back.

Same money. Double https://t.co/gOxhF5wDe9

Banks invented "forced currency conversion" because they know you won't notice.

It's not in your statement. It's hidden in the exchange rate.

Airwallex built multi-currency wallets to work around this entirely.

Your euros stay euros.
Your dollars stay dollars.
You convert when

And it's fast.

Your bank takes 3 days to move money internationally.

Airwallex does it in 8 seconds.

90%+ of transfers arrive within a few hours.

Why? They built their own payment network instead of using SWIFT from the 1970s.

One account replaces your entire finance stack.

No more juggling Stripe + Wise + 5 bank accounts.

Payments, transfers, cards, expense management all in one place.

McLaren Racing and Canva figured this out. Your competitors probably haven't. https://t.co/RWINvZRHQ1

Oh, and they're building AI agents to supercharge your finance department.

Auto collect receipts. Auto match transactions. Auto check compliance.

The boring shit that takes hours? Done in seconds.

Open a German bank account. Right now. In 60 seconds.

No flight to Berlin. No 47 documents. No 6 week wait.

Just done.

Traditional banks can't do this because they're still using fax machines.

If you're moving money internationally and not using Airwallex, you're bleeding cash.

https://t.co/2XaMuADG6B

Check your statements.
You'll get pissed 😤

很难相信，但是...淘宝竟然主动把自己的桌面客户端开放给龙虾了。

我知道很多人喜欢逛淘宝，但是对我来说逛淘宝是件非常累的事情。
因为真的不想花时间和注意力去挑选、比价、咨询客服...

然而接入龙虾之后，购物变成了完全不一样的体验。
